channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: Forget office politics, only the smartest will survive this bloody office outing.

programme.title: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: A gruesome scene adorns a pier in San Pedro, south of Los Angeles. Twenty-seven dead bodies. A burned-out ship smoldering in the harbor.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Eaten By Lions
programme.desc: A hilarious and heart-warming story of half brothers Omar and Pete, who embark on a journey from Bradford to Blackpool to find Omar's real Dad.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Hyren quest leads the kids to the Underneath, where they are shocked to find the realm being controlled by an evil Emperor. Strag discovers a secret even more horrible: his father is helping to rule the realm…

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Vash Naroom library is in a state of chaos. The kids, Orwin and Evu are trying to unearth any mention of an additional Dreamstone. That’s when our heroes realize that the Core is a Moonlands realm too – which means it would have Dreamstone as well.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Venturing into a Shadow Geyser in their pursuit of Korg and Zed – who transformed Orwin into a Shadow Magi and took him down to the Core to serve Agram - Tony, Edyn and Strag drop into a nightmarish maze inside the geyser.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A Weave Emissary named Iyori is being pursued by Core Drushes. As she gets closer to Vash Naroom, Edyn, Tony, and Strag come to her aid and defeat the attacking creatures.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Lately, Lucy’s feeling left out of the gang. The male members of the posse are really grating on her nerves. And when Jet and Chow declare that they’re having an all night belch-a-thon, Lucy throws her arms up in disgust.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pranks for Nothing / Zombie Dearest
programme.desc: Eager to regain his lost prank mojo, McGee releases a mischievous pixy named Hanky Pranky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Diagnosis: Deletion
programme.desc: Blue Angel’s looking to Speed Duel her way to victory, but the diabolical doctor she’s battling is set on prescribing a dose of defeat!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: True Blue
programme.desc: Blue Angel hopes to give her fans something to scream about by defeating Playmaker, but after receiving a dangerous card from the Knights of Hanoi, her fans might be screaming for all the wrong reasons!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Hyren quest leads the kids to the Underneath, where they are shocked to find the realm being controlled by an evil Emperor. Strag discovers a secret even more horrible: his father is helping to rule the realm…

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage
programme.desc: Beauty pageant Gretchen looks to connect with her girly side.
programme.sub-title: Ring Around The Gretchen / Chilli Con Carnage

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While the team is at a racing event in Canada, Captain Strong is meeting with the World Council aboard their massive jet-liner headquarters.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: After failing to destroy the Earth yet again, Master Mayhem gathers his Monsters in the locker room for an evil pep talk. As they study their most fantastic fails, an ancient rivalry between RoBro and Teensy erupts!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon an ancient secret when their quest leads them to the Volcanic realm of Cald. Buried beneath rivers of lava, is the relic-forger, a tool used to create any relic…just by thinking of it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Lost Incident
programme.desc: The chilling details of the past are finally revealed as Playmaker continues his battle with Zaizen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crisis
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slugfight / Izomborg
programme.desc: The campers must travel back in time to prevent Grandpappy Black Butt from stealing the deed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In the ruins of a Naroomi Arena in the forest, Orwin runs Tony, Edyn and Strag through a battle drill with their Dream Creatures. A massive Shadow Geyser erupts nearby, spewing powerful Void Energy into the sky, and sucking Edyn towards it.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar has read about a new scientific theory that blames the extinction of dinosaurs on climate change caused by the creatures’ own overproduction of methane gas. Kane is embarrassed by this theory, and insists it never happened.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: With his new time machine, Piranoid hopes to get rid of the Sharks. He sends Streex back to Jurassic times and Jab to Atlantis.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Trust
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: A race through the old chunnel system that runs under the streets of London becomes deadly when a local anarchist group - led by Zak’s idol, Razor

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In the grass realm of the Weave, Tony, Edyn and Strag battle a vicious Reedwolf before arriving at Qui-Yeteh, the capital city. They find the realm's Dreamstone perched atop a building's roof, out in the open.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While Johnny and his friend Doug are on a practice run over the Pacific, Doug suddenly disappears in a flash of light. The Metajets discover this isn’t the first time jets have disappeared in the area, and head back to investigate.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When ‘Cane and Diesel (”Pirates of the Sky”) go looking for scrap metal on a trash barge, they stumble across the wreckage of Boomer’s sentient jet (”Lightning in a Battle”) which soon takes over their floating village.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek
programme.desc: Squirt is captured by a Tooth Troll!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Lately, Lucy’s feeling left out of the gang. The male members of the posse are really grating on her nerves. And when Jet and Chow declare that they’re having an all night belch-a-thon, Lucy throws her arms up in disgust.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem takes us behind the scenes to show how all that Mayhem gets made! But he accidentally reveals a bit too much, and once the galaxy has seen MM’s cute little “Dream Board” his only solution is to have RoBro destroy us all.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony, Edyn, and Strag open the Book of Elders to the clue page for finding the Deeps of Orothe Dreamstone...when the page suddenly vanishes. Edyn recognizes it as a spell, which they can only break finding the Orothian who cast it.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.
programme.sub-title: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour Legends of Poker final table is set, with Andy Frankenberger and Jared Jaffee headlining.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: A massive field of 1,042 entries turned up for the WPT Borgata Poker Open, and just six players remain in contention for the $734,000 top prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Festa al Lago
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Bellagio for the WPT Festa al Lago, and Andy Frankenberger aims to win two titles in the same season.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic

programme.desc: The World Poker Tour is at Beau Rivage in Biloxi, Mississippi for the WPT Southern Poker Championship.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Invitational - Part 1
programme.desc: It's time for the WPT Invitational final table from Commerce Casino in Los Angeles, with a $100,000 top prize up for grabs.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: The contestants meet journalist Gordon Smart and participate in a press challenge where they write a 60-second skit regarding their opinions of the other contestants, which they later present in front of the camera.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: Letitia, Lisa, and Roxanne receive a second set of makeovers. The contestants meet with Elle at Hyde Park, where they learn that the remaining five contestants will be traveling to Canada for the remainder of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The remaining five contestants fly to Toronto, where they take on the CN Tower's EdgeWalk before moving into their home at the SoHo Metropolitan Hotel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation Calling Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr. Drew helps mediate the conflict between Angelina and Jenni. A messy situation is about to get messier when Deena learns her private conversation with Mike wasn't so private. Mike and Lauren get the best news of their lives.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation Calling Dr. Drew

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation The Wedding Redo
programme.desc: RSVP plan Angelina's wedding redo. Uncle Nino is officiating and Vinny is giving the wedding speech. What could go wrong?
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation The Wedding Redo

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation The Speech Pt. 3
programme.desc: Ten months after a bridesmaids speech almost destroyed the family, Angelina gets her wedding redo, while Mike tries to keep his secret until after the festivities.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation The Speech Pt. 3

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation UMMMM...HELLO, 2021.
programme.desc: The gang is back together and big changes are in the air. Pauly D has a new look, Vinny is looking for a new home, and when social media explodes with rumors about Angelina & Chris's marriage, Mike takes on a new alter ego -The Investigation.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After an extensive nationwide search for aspiring models, a panel of experts have whittled the thousands of applicants down to just 15 girls who will have to battle it out for a place in the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: So far, the 12 girls have proven that they can walk the walk, but their next challenge is to see if they can talk the talk. They are set a press challenge - which of our girls will be an instant headliner and who will be yesterday's news?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The photoshoot this week sees our girls modelling for luxury fashion label Les Eclaires. With their backdrop taking the form of a junkyard, which of our girls will discover gold and who will be left at the bottom of the scrap heap?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls take part in the now infamous makeovers, with both Angel and Georgia struggling to get to grips with their drastic transformations. The final 10 girls also have to produce before and after selfies for the app Relook.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining nine girls jet off to Zagreb to take part in a catwalk challenge for Croatian designer Viktor Drago. This episode's photoshoot is set in the busy Dolac Market. The girls must pose next to fruit and veg in couture dresses.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week the girls take part in a go-see challenge where they meet and walk for international designers Jade and Grant Goulden.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: This week is probably the hardest week for the girls so far. Just as they are getting ready for bed, they discover that they are taking part in an overnight photoshoot for Head and Shoulders posing alongside a very handsome male model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining five girls arrive on the beautiful Caribbean island of Jamaica. The photoshoot this week is set in a Jamaican forest and the girls have to take part in the dreaded nude shoot!

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are challenged to take part in an exclusive video commercial for Caribbean food. Can our girls make eating on camera sexy? Who will struggle with the spicy sauces?! The penultimate photoshoot is set in the gorgeous tropical Konoko Falls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: To help decide who should win the competition, the last challenge sees the girls take part in a huge beach catwalk finale. The judges then deliberate for the very last time and decide who should become Britain's Next Top Model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Iconic judges Abbey Clancy, Paul Sculfor, Hilary Alexander OBE and Nicky Johnston return to their positions with the aim of finding some undiscovered talent amongst the thousands of girls who applied.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tables turn as some of the girls who have proved themselves thus far struggle to keep up the pace in a sugary photoshoot for Patisserie du Bain, whilst some dark horses seem to find their sweet tooth.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: It's the notorious makeover week and the girls arrive at the Paul Edmonds salon in Chelsea to find that these makeovers will be blind - no mirrors and no peeking - until the final reveal. Tears and tantrums lead to sparking tempers.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 181
programme.desc: Is a motorcycle more environmentally friendly than a car? Can a bullet take out an RPG?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 182
programme.desc: Can C4 be used as a cooking fuel? Can you make a throwing weapon that could decapitate an opponent and carry the head back to the thrower?

programme.title: MythBusters: Top 25 Almost Special
programme.desc: The top 25 moments of "MythBusters" are counted down by the cast with additional comments.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 126
programme.desc: Do match heads alone have the explosive punch to fire a homemade cannon? Can a 7-foot ball of Lego blocks become a rolling weapon of mass destruction?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 170
programme.desc: Can a magazine and a toaster be used to blow up a room full of flammable gas? Can the contents of an airplane toilet leak out mid-flight and freeze into a lethal projectile?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 123
programme.desc: Can a car bumper explode? Did Hungarian archers get twice the penetration shooting a bow from a galloping horse?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 222
programme.desc: Can moonshine explode and destroy the shack it is hidden in? Can a car fueled by moonshine run as well as one running on gasoline?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 98
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a ninja deflect a bullet with his palm? Can a person breathe from a car tire underwater? Will an RFID chip explode in an MRI scanner?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 22
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be sucked down by "killer quicksand?" Can a tattoo explode in an MRI scan? Can appliances really electrocute people if they fall in the bathtub?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 24
programme.desc: Myths tested: How many balloons are needed to lift a 40lb child off the ground? Can a sunken boat be lifted to the surface with ping-pong balls?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 137
programme.desc: Can an exploding water heater pass through the second story of a house? Can a person shoot around a corner accurately, using a variety of methods?

programme.title: MythBusters: Upfront Demolition Derby Special
programme.desc: When a bus is moving at over 50 miles per hour, will moving passengers to the inside of the turn keep the bus from flipping? Will a car dropped from 4,000 feet fall faster than a speeding car?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 95
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person's eyes pop out while sneezing with eyes open? Can shifting to reverse stop a runaway car? Can three cigarette butts fired from a black-powder rifle kill a person?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 46
programme.desc: Myths tested: What is the best cure for seasickness? Is it more efficient to drive a truck with its tailgate up than down? Can sticking one's finger in a gun barrel stop a bullet?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 107
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an airplane take off while on a conveyor belt? Can cockroaches, fruit flies and flour beetles survive extreme levels of radiation?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 201
programme.desc: Could Jack have survived with Rose in the ending of "Titanic"? Is it possible to build a rocket-powered surfboard?

programme.title: Battling for Baby
programme.desc: Starring Courteney Cox, Suzanne Pleshette, and Debbie Reynolds. After Katherine decides to return to work to help pay the bills, her baby's grandmothers argue over who will take care of her child.

programme.title: Dirty Work
programme.desc: A spiteful loser finds his true calling when he opens a highly successful business specializing in revenge.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: The Birdcage
programme.desc: Robin Williams, Gene Hackman, Nathan Lane and Dianne Wiest lead the laughs in this wild Comedy that insists you don't have to be a woman to be a mother.

programme.title: Goodbye Lenin!
programme.desc: In 1990, to protect his fragile mother from a fatal shock after a long coma, a young man must keep her from learning that her beloved nation of East Germany as she knew it has disappeared.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he breaks up with his girlfriend, he discovers his ex is actually the reluctant superhero, G Girl. A scorned woman, she unleashes her super powers to humiliate and torment him.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback kidnaps Penfold to lure Danger Mouse into a spaceship and send both of them to a planet ruled by old fashioned looking machines.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The time-travelling grandfather clock makes its return as it appears at Windsor Castle.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals a shrinking ray from the inventor and uses it to steal rare cars from an exhibit.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: hile cutting trees in the forest, Jacques discovers a petrified (stone) tree.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Bombay Duck
programme.desc: Duckula gets tricked by a fake Genie into going to India.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The Earth is flooded with instant custard. Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to outer space to find the Custard Mite of Glut, a small creature that can eat up the custard, but the planet that houses the Mite is controlled by armoured aliens.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Clutch Hawks enters Wildcat in the demolition duel in Memphis, only to learn Vanessa Warfield and Bruno "Mad Dog" Sheppard are also entered, with Manta and Stinger.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: Pink, Pink and Away': Super Pink flies into action when the Dogfather robs a bank and then accidentally kidnaps a little boy. 'Down on the Ant Farm': The Panther's experimental ant farm, complete with Ant, is accidentally delivered to the Aardvark.
programme.sub-title: Pink, Pink And Away/Down On The Ant Farm

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Stool Parrot': The Inspector and Panther must protect a witness to a fifty million diamond robbery...the Parrot. 'Pinky and Slusho': When the Panther's sno-cone business is threatened by Manly Man, the Panther creates Slusho, a talking snowman.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Mystery Cruise
programme.desc: Duckula is sat alone in the castle waiting for Nanny's favourite TV show "Super duper double drachma deal" to start.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM follows ancient clues carved into the mountains of South America that will lead them to a treasure.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse discovers that Baron Greenback is behind a wave of attack robots that have been going after agents that work with DM.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Duck and the Broccoli Stalk
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny find themselves up a broccoli-stalk and into a giant's castle.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Under orders from a supercomputer, all the world's machines mutiny and refuse to do their jobs.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold gets a pop-up book of monsters from a mysterious book sales club, but it turns out to be from J.J. Quark who turns the monsters in the book alive. Danger Mouse eventually turns the tide by drawing in a monster of his own.
programme.sub-title: Have You Fled from any Good Books Lately?

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Space alien J. J. Quark announces that he is going to claim the Earth as his.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Make Pink, Not War
programme.desc: Pink Panther is caught in a crossfire between two feuding Big Noses with water balloons.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to Australia where they pick up top secret plans from an agent rat in the form of a rugby ball. Penfold gets distracted by a boomerang and is later picked up by large bird of prey.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Around the World in a Total Daze
programme.desc: Von Goosewing challenges Duckula to a race around the world.
programme.sub-title: Around the World in a Total Daze

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pantherobics': In order to get on a TV show, Pinky goes through a rigorous training routine with a gruff, old personal trainer. 'Pinkenstein': A love-struck Witch is after our hero who builds a Panther look-alike Frankenstein to distract her.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Professor Squakencluck shows off his time machine. However, when Penfold gets too close to the machine's targeted area, he is sucked into the past, 150 million years ago, in exchange for a dinosaur egg. Danger Mouse heads back to look for him.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: The challenge is a road race looping through the Devil's Punchbowl.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Ducknapped
programme.desc: A ransom note is sent to Castle Duckula saying that Count Duckula has been kidnapped,.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinkadoon': Taxi driver Pinky gets trapped in an Arabian Nights city which magically appears for only one hour every hundred years. 'A Camp-Pink We Will Go': Working as a park ranger, the Panther tries to keep peace and quiet at Hand Rock Park.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted get help from Henry Ford in repairing Detective Logan's classic car after they borrow it without permission. Along the way, they introduce an unusual Thanksgiving dinner to the Pilgrims and start the Wright Brothers on a new career.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Driving Mr. Pink': Pinky calls a taxi to get to an urgent appointment, only to find that the taxi driver is the Voodoo Man. 'Ant & The Aardvark': The Aardvark just keeps trying to eat Ant, but a picnicking Rhino always seems to be in his way.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K. is kidnapped by a mechanical cat named P.A.W.S.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback offers to team up with Danger Mouse in order to thwart an alien invasion. Professor Sqawkencluck outfits the Space Hopper with a secret weapon.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Reluctant Ninja': To retrieve the stolen jade monkey for the Empress of China, the Panther enlists the help of martial arts master Ho Hum. 'Pantherella': The Panther reads the classic tale of Cinderella, but everything in the story's wrong!

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Pink Pink Pink
programme.desc: Wackiness ensues when Pink Panther's music machine creates three offbeat multiples of him.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: The boys risk changing the present when they travel back in time to find Bill's father and his antique pocket watch. Before they recover the timepiece, they visit West Virginia, Switzerland, and finally Queen Victoria in London.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Baron Greenback gets Count Duckula to use his hypnosis powers to turn members of the British Parliament into show-biz crazy entertainers. In exchange, Count Duckula will get a television show.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Great Ducktective
programme.desc: Goosewing tries to frame Duckula for a relative's murder.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: And Not a Drop to Pink
programme.desc: Pink Panther tries to secure an ancient artifact, but ends up disturbing the sleep of mummy Big Nose.
programme.sub-title: And Not a Drop to Pink

programme.title: Count Duckula: Mutinous Penguins
programme.desc: Lost in the Arctic seas, Duckula, Igor and Nanny must survive in order to find their home.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Remotely Pink
programme.desc: When Pink orders a new remote control, he doesn't expect it to manipulate everything except the television.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mayhem steals an electrical power absorbing machine and proceeds to rob Japan of its power.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Astro Duck
programme.desc: Duckula's new computer causes problems for TRASH and ends up landing the castle on the moon.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Arctic Circles
programme.desc: Duckula travels to the North Pole.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mask enters the Baja race. But when Miles Mayem shows up for the race in Buzzard, it's apparent this is more than just a mere race.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Magic
programme.desc: When Pink Panther brings a new magic act into town, the tricks are on his magician competition, Big Nose.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Lifestyles of the Pink and Famous': When valet Pinky saves the life of a zillionaire, he's given a million dollar reward. 'Happy Trails Pinky': Pinky's stage coach company is threatened by the transcontinental railroad and a not too bright robber.
programme.sub-title: Lifestyles Of The Pink And Famous

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: This is the original story that explains how racing came to be an integral part of the Mask-Venom relationship: Miles Mayem decided to allow his brother Max to join Venom.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a former office in Derby, a derelict London property and a flat in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 7
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a plot of land in Cheshire, a house in Surrey which is in a bit of a muddle and a development project in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an art deco flat in South London, a terraced house on the Isle of Sheppy and a house in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Cornwall, a small property in Hertfordshire and a terraced house in Plymouth.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a house on the outskirts of Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in West London, Kent and Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Nottinghamshire that is just waiting for its potential to be tapped, a north west London flat that'll need more than a steamer to sort out the décor, and finally a cottage in Cornwall is not what it seems from the outside.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Cheshire, a bungalow in Peterborough and an unusual property in Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Lucy & Martin Roberts visit a studio flat in Chelsea, London. They travel to Manchester to see an end of terrace in need of refurbishment, and then it's on to Plymouth where a house has art deco features and a bargain basement!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 40
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a bungalow in Gravesend, a detached cottage in Derby which has been left unoccupied for 40 years & a spacious ground floor flat with a sea view in Hove.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit Battersea where the old power station may dominate the skyline, but is this an area where property value will head sky high?

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 13
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a bungalow in Derby which needs a lot of work, a well loved semi detached in Gravesend and a house that's in a bit of a mess in Wigan.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Derbyshire, a former cigar warehouse in London and an unusual flat in Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a two bedroomed terraced house in Derby, some land in Kent with planning permission for three houses and a grade two listed cottage in Wiltshire.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: The Young Nurses
programme.desc: Kitty, Michelle and Joanne are lively young nurses who work at a large hospital and give the sexiest treatment you've ever seen in The Young Nurses.

programme.title: The Odd Job
programme.desc: Arthur becomes suicidal when his wife leaves him. Failing to do the deed himself, he enlists the services of a strange man to kill him, but when Arthur's wife decides to come back, he discovers that the man has every intention of finishing the job.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: In the retro-future world, a government bureaucrat tries to correct an administrative error and quickly finds himself an enemy of the state.

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Bowery at Midnight
programme.desc: Kindly soup kitchen operator and professor of criminology, Karl Wagner, uses his soup kitchen as a front for a criminal gang. When things get out of hand, Wagner kills his henchmen, who wind up as zombies in the cellar of the soup kitchen.

programme.title: The Ape
programme.desc: Dr. Bernard Adrian is a kindly mad scientist who seeks to cure a young woman's polio. He needs spinal fluid from a human to complete the formula for his experimental serum.

programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death In The Delta
programme.desc: When a wealthy young woman was abducted in front of her in-laws' home, the police had no shortage of suspects. The 25-year-old victim left behind a tumultuous marriage, an ex-husband and old boyfriends. All were on the FBI's short list.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An Italian officer helps Hogan photograph a new German anti-aircraft gun.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: For Colonel Hogan's birthday his crew decides to give him one ammunition dump freshly destroyed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk hides a stolen German codebook in a dry well, Hogan must come up with a way to get it back.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink and Hogan's men together head to the Russian front on a suicide mission to steal some secret documents.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A gas station has just been set up at Stalag 13 and Hogan plans to blow it up.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses Burkhalter's sister as a pawn to get back a captured Allied spy.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Again Hogan uses Klink to deliver information to the Underground but Klink is arrested by the Gestapo for treason on other grounds. Thus Hogan and his men must find a way to free Klink before the Gestapo finds the info on him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's assignment is to discover the secrets of a new bomb (the "Chicken Hawk") that seeks out radio signals, and think of a way to stop its manufacture.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is being blackmailed by the Gestapo and Hogan plans to help him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan receives orders to get a secret box off a plane that went down near Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hochstetter traces a defecting Field Marshall to Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plants an empty parachute in the camp sending the Germans on a wild goose chase for a downed Allied agent.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to deal in supposedly rare cuckoo clocks so that he can send out information.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk poses as a traitor to send information via a propaganda radio broadcast.
programme.sub-title: Is There A Traitor In The House?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2004, Marc Dutroux was sentenced to life for kidnapping, raping, and murdering young girls in Belgium. His 1996 arrest and delayed trial exposed horrific crimes and official failings, sparking public outrage.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Murder by the Mob depicts the battle for justice by Peppino Impastato's family after his 1978 death was misclassified. His mother and brother reopened the case, leading to mafia boss Gaetano Badalamenti's 2002 conviction for the murder.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Ruthless Killers
programme.desc: Ruthless Killers: They kill for all manner of reasons. Their victims: men, women, and even children. What motivates them, and how can they be stopped? Investigators reach their limits hunting them down.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Serial Killers
programme.desc: Serial Killers victims are often selected at random. The murders have only one thing in common: the bodies are savagely disfigured. Hunting them leads investigators into a world of darkness.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: This is the tragic tale of Susan Smith, who shocked the nation in 1994 by fabricating a carjacking to cover up the drowning murders of her two young sons.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On October 11, 1998, Dr. Harold Shipman is tried for murdering fifteen elderly patients. Exhumation and evidence of lethal morphine lead to his conviction. He is later found to have killed 215 people.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Murder by Number
programme.desc: Just after midnight on Saturday, August 27th 1988, driving instructor Keith Slater is woken by his doorbell. As he opens the door a man asks, ‘Keith Slater?’ before knifing him in the throat. He dies on his doorstep in his wife’s arms.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Island of Lies
programme.desc: An investigation into a 23-year-old Hawaiian tourist's rape and murder reveals a world of drugs and deception few vacationers ever see. And it's up to one lone detective to get the victims family some justice.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Gambling with Death
programme.desc: Deep in Southern Louisiana, the bodies start piling up in a series of deadly home invasions. There's a curious link between the victims and a similar MO, and before long a combined task force is on the hunt for a serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Before He Kills Again
programme.desc: A woman’s body is dumped alongside a road near Tampa, Florida. And within a year, the bodies of two more women are found at the side of the road. Detectives fear a serial predator is on the loose, but the search for the killer will take years.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When a pretty and popular Brooklyn college student disappears after a night out in Manhattan, her wealthy father files a missing persons report and tragically, her charred remains are discovered in a basement.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: When a 25-year-old woman disappears from Portland, Maine’s bar district on October 22nd 2001, her mother immediately suspects foul play and launches a missing person’s poster campaign.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Seven in the Cooler
programme.desc: In one of the most shocking crimes in Chicago’s history, seven fast food workers are gunned down and their bodies left in the restaurant’s walk-in freezer. With the suburb of Palatine reeling police struggle to piece together the deadly puzzle.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Framed
programme.desc: In Ada Oklahoma, 21-year-old Debbie Sue Carter is found raped, beaten, and strangled in her apartment. It’s a horrific scene; a belt around her neck, a bloody palm print by her bed, cryptic notes scrawled in ketchup, and nail polish on the walls.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: On June 17, 1994, a tugboat operator is towing a log boom down the Fraser River from Port Coquitlam when he notices something caught up on one of the logs. Upon closer inspection, he discovers a human body.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Scenario for a Murder
programme.desc: Since October 10th 2008, no-one has seen friendly 38 year-old bachelor John Altinger. All that his friends know is that he was going to a garage in a residential area of Edmonton, to meet a woman he’d met on an online dating site.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods
programme.desc: On June 24th 1990, the day after a rock festival near Roseisle in Manitoba, 16 year-old Brigitte Grenier is found lying dead in a stream in the middle of the woods. The teenager’s body shows signs of violence and sexual mutilations.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.
programme.sub-title: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Getting to Know Rick O'Shea
programme.desc: In this episode we get know Larry’s friend Rick O’Shea (Ricochet).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone! Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy?
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Schapbo
programme.desc: John Rambo’s ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: Terry finally gets to compare himself to Brad Pitt!! Terry and Larry test 3 scenes from action film Mr. and Mrs. Smith.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Investigating the 2010 Gulf of Mexico oil disaster; Liz takes part in wildlife rescue efforts.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: A demo of calorific value by taking part in the Oxbridge Boat Race; testing MP's abilities to calculate risk.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz visits the volcano that stopped air travel in 2010; predicting probabilities in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of IVF; following couples who undertake IVF treatment; going 360 degrees on a swing.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: MOON SHINE
programme.desc: The International drive to return to the Moon is gathering pace, this multi- nation effort is readying to return, stay and utilise the Lunar assets.

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS
programme.desc: Imaging a black hole was a breakthrough in astronomy, now with the new satellite IXPE high energy telescope we will be looking at some of the most dramatic, and most violent objects in the universe: Colliding Black holes and Neutron Stars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.
programme.sub-title: The Space Race, The Hubble, Chasing Comets & Space Debris

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury, The Mars Express & The Soyuz Launch System

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury Advancement, Camera Tracking & The International Space Station

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini, Venus Express, EMU & Deep Space Communication

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Advances, Cassini at Saturn & More About Mars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Docking, Mars Curiousity & Satellite Swarms

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.
programme.sub-title: The Apollo Program Begins, Caves & Planck

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.
programme.sub-title: Rebuilding Apollo, Orbiting Carbon & Zero Gravity Training

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.
programme.sub-title: Beyond Earth Orbit, IXV Vehicles & Galileo Satellites Lost and Found

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.
programme.sub-title: To The Moon, SpaceX's Dragon and Falcon & GAIA

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.
programme.sub-title: The Beginning of the End, Apollo Gets Complicated & The End of Apollo

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.
programme.sub-title: The Shuttle Program, The Challenger Disaster & Return to Space

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.
programme.sub-title: The Space Shuttle Matures, Complex Space Construction & The Final Years of the Space Shuttle

programme.desc: Are there extraterrestrials and what will happen when aliens attack us?

programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: Way of the Dragon

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: Resistance

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.

programme.desc: Nikki reveals her secret brotherly affairs, but will Joe ever be able to forgive her? Then, “Six O’Clock” confesses that she’s been sleeping with her friend Carisa’s man for money!

programme.desc: Hope is here to confront her best friend, Laura, for stealing her boyfriend, Joey, and then becoming engaged to him. Next, John will claim he's not to be blamed for sleeping with his girlfriend's best friend!

programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.
